claims.quote: Start Your Career in Research at BMCWorking at Boston Medical Center means you’re part of a mission to provide exceptional and equitable care
claims.claimText: BMC promotes research careers at the institution (Tier 3 careers signal).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Career invitation to join BMC research team falls under post-trainee practice/career (Tier 3).
claims.limitations: No physician-specific job title, no visa or compensation details.

claims.quote:
Find a Career
You LoveJoin us as we reimagine healthcare for Boston and beyond.
claims.claimText: BMC careers portal homepage inviting candidates to find a career.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Careers portal landing page for general employment at BMC — Tier 3 post-trainee/career content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Featured OpeningsNursing CareersRadiology CareersPharmacy CareersWe’re hiring across departments and care teamsView All Career Areas
claims.claimText: BMC lists featured openings including Nursing, Radiology, and Pharmacy careers.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Featured career areas on careers portal — Tier 3 employment listings.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Award-winning benefits that work for you across health, financial wellness, and wellbeing.
claims.claimText: BMC advertises benefits covering health, financial wellness, and wellbeing.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Employee benefits language is Tier 3 career-side content.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: please send an e-mail to Talentacquisition@bmc.org or call 617-638-8582
claims.claimText: Talent Acquisition contact: Talentacquisition@bmc.org / 617-638-8582 for accommodation requests.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Talent Acquisition contact tied to careers portal — Tier 3.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Boston Medical Center participates in the Electronic Employment Verification, Program. As an E-Verify employer, all employees are also subject to completing a background check.
claims.claimText: BMC is an E-Verify employer requiring background checks for all employees.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: E-Verify employment-verification statement is Tier 3 employer-side policy.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.claimText: Careers page contains no mention of observership, visiting students, electives, or USCE programs.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Absence of USCE-relevant content on a careers portal — no Tier 1 signal.
claims.limitations: Silence on USCE topics is not a refusal.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Utility MenuCareersNursingPharmacyRadiologyView AllDonateRefer a PatientRequest an AppointmentMyChartLanguage
claims.claimText: Site chrome references Careers links (Nursing, Pharmacy, Radiology).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic site-chrome Careers reference; Tier 3 future-lane signal only.
claims.limitations: Chrome navigation only; no job content.

claims.claimText: Top utility navigation surfaces general Careers, Nursing, Pharmacy, and Radiology career entry points at BMC (Tier 3 careers signal).
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the in-body 'Start Your Career in Research' line; the utility-menu careers nav (including nursing/pharmacy/radiology paths) is a separate chrome-level careers signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Generic careers / nursing / pharmacy / radiology career portals are post-trainee practice/career entry points (Tier 3).
claims.limitations: Navigation chrome only; no physician-specific titles, eligibility, visa, or compensation details.

claims.quote: Medical RecordsPrice TransparencyMedia RelationsMedical Staff ServicesVendor Access
claims.claimText: Footer references a Medical Staff Services entry point at BMC (Tier 3 credentialing/services signal).
claims.whyA1Missed: Buried in footer utility list; A1 focused on body content and missed the medical-staff/credentialing services link.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Medical Staff Services indicates credentialing/practice-support infrastructure relevant to attending physicians (Tier 3).
claims.limitations: Footer link only; no descriptive content about scope or eligibility.

claims.quote: Helpful Research LinksOffice of Research and Sponsored ProgramsClinical TrialsIndustry CollaborationsPast Issues of “Research Matters”
claims.claimText: BMC links to an Office of Research and Sponsored Programs and Industry Collaborations portal (research infrastructure signal; not a stated student-research elective).
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured body marketing language but did not record the explicit Office of Research and Sponsored Programs / Industry Collaborations resource list.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Sponsored programs / industry collaboration infrastructure primarily supports established investigators (Tier 3).
claims.limitations: Link list only; page does not state whether medical students or trainees may apply for research electives via this office.

claims.quote: Boston Medical Center’s policy is to ensure equal employment opportunities for all, without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity and/or expression or any other non-job-related characteristic.
claims.claimText: BMC equal employment opportunity / non-discrimination statement covers protected characteristics.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: EEO/non-discrimination statement on a careers portal is Tier 3 employer-policy content distinct from the E-Verify quote.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the E-Verify/background-check sentence and skipped the separate EEO/non-discrimination sentence that follows it.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Boston Medical Center (BMC) is a 567-bed academic medical center located in Boston’s historic South End, providing medical care for infants, children, teens and adults.
claims.claimText: BMC self-describes as a 567-bed academic medical center in Boston's South End.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Institutional descriptor on the careers portal — context for academic medical center career setting (Tier 3).
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the 'academic medical center' self-description, which is relevant context for downstream classification of BMC as a teaching institution.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family CAREERS_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Boston Medical Center provides a comprehensive benefits package to all of its employees.
claims.claimText: BMC offers a comprehensive benefits package to all employees (institution-wide, Tier 3 signal in addition to housestaff content).
claims.limitations: Sentence is general; specific employee (non-housestaff) benefit detail not enumerated here.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 folded this sentence entirely into housestaff-benefits framing; the 'to all of its employees' clause is a distinct Tier 3 general-employee signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Statement explicitly references 'all of its employees' (institution-wide employment), broader than housestaff/resident scope.

claims.claimText: Page exposes a dedicated Nursing Careers link distinct from generic Careers chrome.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Nursing Careers is a Tier 3 careers-lane chrome signal not captured by A1's combined utility-menu Careers claim.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1's careers claim cited the top utility menu only; the 'For Medical Professionals' block separately surfaces 'Nursing Careers'.
claims.limitations: Nursing-specific, not physician careers; chrome reference only.

claims.claimText: Site utility menu links to Careers (and Nursing/Pharmacy/Radiology careers) — Tier 3 careers chrome signal.
claims.limitations: Generic site-wide utility menu, not specific to this research page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the residency/fellowship chrome but did not separately surface the careers/nursing/pharmacy utility-menu link as a Tier 3 careers signal.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Utility menu link to a careers landing area — Tier 3 future-lane jobs signal.

claims.claimText: BMC site chrome references a Nursing Careers section (navigation only, not Tier 3 physician careers).
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Nursing careers link is a post-trainee job pathway, Tier 3 careers context (nursing, not physician).
claims.whyA1Missed: Appears twice in utility/footer chrome lists; A1 captured residency/fellowship chrome but skipped the careers chrome line.

claims.claimText: Site-wide utility menu surfaces Careers / Nursing / Pharmacy / Radiology entry points (navigation chrome only).
claims.limitations: Navigation chrome only; no job postings, eligibility, or contact info present on this page.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 treated the page as patient-facing disease content and ignored the global utility nav.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Careers/Nursing links are post-trainee practice/career navigation surfaces.
